pages.title: The Future of AI: Challenges and Opportunities
pages.content:
Title: The Future of AI: Challenges and Opportunities
Authors: Smith, J., Chen, L., Rodriguez, M.
Year: 2023
Journal: Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research
DOI: 10.1234/jair.2023.001

Abstract: This paper explores the emerging challenges and opportunities in artificial intelligence, focusing on ethical implications and technological advancements. It provides a comprehensive review of current AI limitations and proposes a framework for responsible AI development.

pages.title: Automation Trends in Modern Manufacturing
pages.content:
Title: Automation Trends in Modern Manufacturing
Authors: Lee, S., Park, H.
Year: 2022
Journal: International Journal of Automation
DOI: 10.5678/ija.2022.005

Abstract: This study examines the latest trends in industrial automation, including robotic process automation, smart factories, and workforce implications. The authors analyze case studies from leading manufacturing firms and project future adoption rates.
